ddls:
CREATE TABLE "productions" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the production */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of production (e.g., movie, series, documentary) */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year(s) the production was released */,
  "rated" TEXT /* Rating of the production */,
  "released" TEXT /* Date the production was released */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb ID for the production */,
  "imdb_rating" REAL /* IMDb rating for the production */,
  "imdb_votes" INTEGER /* Number of IMDb votes for the production */,
  "production_company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website for the production */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the production poster */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the production trailer */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the production */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the production */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the production in minutes */,
  "parent_production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent production (for sequels, prequels, etc.) */,
  "production_status" TEXT /* Current status of the production (e.g., released, in production, planned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_productions_production_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_company_id") REFERENCES production_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for sub-genres) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_genres" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crews" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member (e.g., director, writer) */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the crew member */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the crew member */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the crew member */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the crew member's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_crews" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member in the production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id", "crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_languages" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id", "language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_countries" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id", "country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, viewer, editor) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the production */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-10) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES productions ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the production company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the production company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequences" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production */,
  "prequel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prequel production */,
  "sequel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequel production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequences_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES productions ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequences_prequel_id FOREIGN KEY ("prequel_id") REFERENCES productions ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequences_sequel_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequel_id") REFERENCES productions ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES productions ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nominations" (
  "nomination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nomination */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was nominated */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nomination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES productions ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the production */,
  "engagement" REAL /* Engagement metrics for the production (e.g., likes, comments) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES productions ("production_id")
)
